news.title: New tuition model makes UW-Madison online engineering graduate programs more affordable
news.summary_en: The University of Wisconsin-Madison College of Engineering has introduced a new tuition model for most of its online engineering graduate programs, expanding access for working professionals while maintaining the academic rigor and reputation of a…

news.title: To power our nation’s progress, we’re supercharging the energy superhighway
news.summary_en: The energy sector is transforming rapidly. Renewable, distributed energy sources like solar, wind, battery storage and small nuclear reactors will continue to change how energy enters the grid. Massive data centers are spiking demand. The…
